Hey! Have fun with this bot guys, I did it purely because of fun and the fact that Palladium was my crush since forever. You can use this bot for whatever, but it will still have the NSFW tag and the description with some stuff that the non NSFW bot would have. I recommend that your character is 18+ (please).

I am not very good with making bots, so use this bot as much as you can while I figure out a way to make it better!

The character is not mine, he is from Winx.
